name: Nebula Bubble Pop
description: Nebula Bubble Pop is an immersive space-themed bubble shooter featuring 50 challenging levels. Navigate through deep-space sectors by matching and popping colorful nebulas to clear the board. Use strategic aim to trigger massive orphan drops and maximize your score as you progress through increasingly difficult galactic stages.
instructions: Aim Move your mouse or drag your finger on the screen to adjust the trajectory line Shoot Click or release your touch to fire the bubble Objective Match 3 or more bubbles of the same color to clear them Clear all bubbles to advance to the next syste
